title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sanofi India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Sanofi India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Pune office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Sanofi India:
Sanofi India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sanofi India!
